clusters.headline: South Africa: Matlala Assassination Trial Begins - South African News Briefs - July 20, 2026
Key takeaways from the World Cup 2026 final as Spain beat Argentina
clusters.summary: Midfield dominance, stifling Lionel Messi and gifted wingers - Spain outclassed Argentina to lift the World Cup.

clusters.headline: Algeria: Algeria Seeks Larger EU Energy Role Amid Regional Tensions
clusters.summary: [DW] Algeria and Germany agreed to deepen energy ties during President Abdelmadjid Tebboune's recent visit to Berlin. But Algiers is still grappling with tensions at home, over Western Sahara and instability in the Sahel.

Diplomacy and war are instruments for achieving national interest, Iran's foreign ministry spokesperson says

clusters.headline: Many in Muslim community 'disappointed and saddened' after Faishal Ibrahim’s resignation: Zaqy Mohamad
clusters.summary: Mr Zaqy Mohamad has replaced Associate Professor Faishal Ibrahim as acting minister-in-charge of Muslim affairs.

clusters.headline: Smaller dialysis operators warn out-of-pocket fees may rise as Middle East conflict drives up costs
clusters.summary: But they assured that no one will be denied life-saving treatment because they cannot afford to pay.

clusters.headline: Test that found source of US explosive diarrhoea outbreak was false positive, health officials say
clusters.summary: The latest update from the US Food and Drug Administration means the exact source of the parasite is still not known.

Centcom claims attacks on Iranian command centres, air defence facilities, coastal surveillance

clusters.headline: Kenya: Kenya's Rift Valley Residents Reach Breaking Point - 'The Lake Moved Into My House'
clusters.summary: [RFI] With Kenya's Lake Baringo and Lake Bogoria rising for months now, following above-average rainfall across the Rift Valley over recent years, this summer has seen them - and the communities around them - reach tipping point.

clusters.headline: Crowding, inconsiderate behaviour, air-con issues among top commuter concerns: PTC survey
clusters.summary: The survey found that overall 87 per cent of commuters expressed satisfaction with Singapore’s public transport system.

clusters.headline: Kenya: Police Investigate Murder After Shallow Grave With Human Remains Found in Machakos
clusters.summary: [Capital FM] Machakos -- Police have launched a murder investigation after the partially decomposed body of a man was discovered in a shallow grave near Mukengesya River in Kithyoko, Machakos County.

clusters.headline: Zimbabwe: Zanu-PF Holds Countrywide 'Thank You Rallies' to Appreciate Support for CAB3
clusters.summary: [New Zimbabwe] ZANU PF at the weekend held "CAB3 Thank You Rallies" in all the country's 10 provinces to recognise and appreciate its supporters who rallied behind the recently assented Constitutional Amendment Bill Number 3 into law.
